summary: Added 12 I6 property tests proving delegation non-escalation holds for arbitrary capability sets. Tests exercise every capability type in the taxonomy as both enabled and delegated. Verified checkDelegationNonEscalation() takes enabledCapSet as injectable parameter (extensible for per-agent C_eff in v0.2). Updated authority.ts with v0.2 design notes for per-agent capability scoping. No kernel boundary violations.

verification.notes: All verification passed. build, lint, tests — all green.
